title: P0: Restore or replace the dream setting
before: No dreaming/sleep-time control in otto desktop Settings; no dream string in apps/desktop.
after: Settings → General exposes Dreaming / sleep-time trigger (Off / Step count / Compaction event) with memfs gate; persists to ~/.otto/config.json and syncs Letta settings.json for active agent.
notes: Replaces missing Letta /sleeptime surface in otto desktop; does not touch staging or canonical app bundles.
